classifications.phrase: economy is expected to bounce back relatively quickly
many firms are now hiring, which will boost employment
unemployment rate to trend lower over the next couple of years
Inflation has picked up, but in underlying terms is still low
A further, but only gradual, pick-up in underlying inflation is expected
Wages growth is expected to pick up gradually as the labour market tightens
The decision to discontinue the yield target reflects the improvement in the economy
earlier-than-expected progress towards the inflation target
The Board will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the…
The Board is prepared to be patient

payload.rationale: The statement signals a gradual transition toward tightening by discontinuing yield targeting and acknowledging progress on inflation and employment, while maintaining dovish guidance through patient forward guidance and low underlying inflation concerns.
